name: Chocolate Caramel Pecan Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Mix the cookie crumbs and butter. Press the mixture onto the bottom and sides of a 9-inch springform pan. Bake for 10 minutes.
3. Microwave the caramels and milk in a small bowl on high for 4-5 minutes, or until melted. Stir every minute to ensure even melting.
4. Pour the melted caramel mixture over the crust.
5. Top with chopped pecans.
6. Beat the cream cheese and sugar together until well blended.
7. Add eggs one at a time, mixing thoroughly after each addition.
8. Blend in the melted chocolate and vanilla extract.
9. Pour the batter over the pecans.
10. Place the pan on a cookie sheet to prevent condensation from soaking the bottom of the pan.
11. Bake for 45 minutes. Loosen the cake from the rim of the pan, then cool before removing it from the pan. Keep refrigerated. Garnish with whipped cream before serving.
